wordplay_note: A path-maker plotting to prevent nuclear war
card_description: Rudolf Wegener (meaning "Wegener = wayfarer / path-maker") is a character in Philip K. Dick's *The Man in the High Castle*. German intelligence officer plotting against the Nazi nuclear strike plan. Name note: A path-maker plotting to prevent nuclear war. The moral German — resistance within the machinery of evil. First appears in *The Man in the High Castle*.
first_work: The Man in the High Castle
work_list: The Man in the High Castle

reference.significance: The moral German — resistance within the machinery of evil
